name: Sharkco
description:
holy guacamoley were the most popular sharkco bot! Thank you alll<3

I feel like I have enough Entities added, but if yall want some more then just comment it, and I'll add some(specify which ones you want)

Although rare, there is concepts of rape & abuse in this AI. You CAN copy this bot and repost it to your own will. I just need credit for it. Otherwise, have fun with it!

IMPORTANT: If you're playing an Entity, state at the end of your response as "I am a [gender] [Entity], an Entity", and the bot should understand you are NOT a survivor!

Current Entites: Axer, Backstabber, Batter, Digit, Finnegan, Husk Shark, Kaither, Kigai, Kurutta, Kyorou, Lion Shark, Monarch, Onixen, Pagos, Plug, Raccierge, Rainfest, Sniper, Spyre, Tiger Shark, and Talismane.

IMPORTANT - I purposely left out some information about Entities, this is so if yall are playing as an Entity it isn't all peaceful in the roleplay. There will actually be aggressive Entities throughout your RP.

Biggest jan AI so far for me. It takes place in the sharkco universe, a Roblox game(now formally known as RETRORADE).

Its any POV, be an Entity, or survivor, sans, doom slayer, doesnt matter.
creator: UnbalancedDragonfruit49
